title: Mother's Choice Organic Cotton Baby Socks, 12 Pairs, Unisex 0-6 Months - Soft, Hypoallergenic Newborn & Infant Socks - Baby Girl & Boy Gifts (Brown - Grey - White)
features: 𝗢𝗿𝗴𝗮𝗻𝗶𝗰, 𝗦𝗸𝗶𝗻-𝗙𝗿𝗶𝗲𝗻𝗱𝗹𝘆 𝗖𝗼𝗺𝗳𝗼𝗿𝘁: Embrace your baby's feet with the pure softness of Mother's Choice baby socks. Our organic cotton fabric is gentle and hypoallergenic, ideal for newborns' sensitive skin, ensuring comfort without the risk of irritation.

𝗦𝘁𝗮𝘆-𝗢𝗻 𝗧𝗲𝗰𝗵𝗻𝗼𝗹𝗼𝗴𝘆 𝗳𝗼𝗿 𝗔𝗰𝘁𝗶𝘃𝗲 𝗕𝗮𝗯𝗶𝗲𝘀: Designed with your baby's activity in mind, our socks feature a unique stay-on technology. They provide a snug fit that stays in place throughout the day, perfect for babies aged 0-6 months who are always on the move. 75% Organic Cotton, 23% Polyester, 2% Spandex.

𝗘𝗮𝘀𝘆 𝗖𝗮𝗿𝗲 𝗮𝗻𝗱 𝗟𝗼𝗻𝗴-𝗟𝗮𝘀𝘁𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝗤𝘂𝗮𝗹𝗶𝘁𝘆: Durable and easy to maintain, these socks are built to last. Machine washable and resistant to wear, they keep their soft feel and vibrant colors wash after wash, saving you time and ensuring long-term use.

𝗔𝗱𝗮𝗽𝘁𝗮𝗯𝗹𝗲 𝗮𝗻𝗱 𝗙𝗮𝘀𝗵𝗶𝗼𝗻-𝗙𝗼𝗿𝘄𝗮𝗿𝗱: Our socks come in a range of adorable, gender-neutral designs and colors. Each pack offers different styles, making them a versatile choice for any outfit and occasion. They're not only practical but also add a stylish touch to your baby's wardrobe.

𝗜𝗱𝗲𝗮𝗹 𝗚𝗶𝗳𝘁 𝘄𝗶𝘁𝗵 𝗘𝘅𝗰𝗲𝗽𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻𝗮𝗹 𝗩𝗮𝗹𝘂𝗲: Presented in attractive packaging, this pack set is an excellent choice for baby showers, a thoughtful baby gift for new parents, or a must-have addition to any baby registry. It offers remarkable quality at an affordable price, providing both style and functionality.
